def positive_helper_returns_live_internal_collection_reference():
    rule_id = "helper_returns_live_internal_collection_reference"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag helpers that hand out direct references to mutable internal lists, dicts, or sets instead of copies or read-only views."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
